steps.title: Recognize what the task requires
steps.content: The goal is to present the findings—the empirical results. The study has TWO findings: phosphorus removal (52% improvement) and bloom yield (65 per square meter). An effective presentation must convey both.

steps.title: Find the answer that includes both findings
steps.content: C presents both findings—phosphorus removal and market-quality blooms—using the not only...but also structure to show their dual significance. The others fail: A states a conclusion rather than findings; B wrongly assigns the 52% statistic to blooms instead of phosphorus; D attempts both but ambiguously phrases the phosphorus result. That matches choice C — C is correct.
